sources.sql: 'SELECT id, legal_name, primary_sector, country_iso FROM csrd_entity_registry ORDER BY legal_name'
'SELECT indicator_code, numeric_value, text_value, unit, data_quality_score FROM csrd_kpi_values WHERE CAST(entity_registry_id AS text) LIKE %(eid)s'
'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM csrd_kpi_values WHERE CAST(entity_registry_id AS text) = %(eid)s'
"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM csrd_gap_tracker WHERE CAST(entity_registry_id AS text) = %(eid)s AND gap_status != 'closed'"
